{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/308-table-of-contents.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Table of Contents


{quote}1. _The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything_{quote}

----





h2. Table of Contents

1. _The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything_
2. _What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build_
3. _What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks_
4. _The Symbiotic Architecture_
5. _Four Integration Paths in Order of Accessibility_
6. _Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind_
7. _Practical First Steps This Month_
8. _Implications for Nautilus and OKWF_
9. _Risks and Open Questions_
10. _Strategic Positioning_

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [253-table-of-contents|253-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.15)
* [137-table-of-contents|137-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.13)
* [211-table-of-contents|211-table-of-contents.md] (сходство 0.13)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [253-table-of-contents|253-table-of-contents.md]
* [211-table-of-contents|211-table-of-contents.md]
* [137-table-of-contents|137-table-of-contents.md]
* [322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix|322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix.md]


h2. Упоминается в

* [1. The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything|309-1-the-cowork-discovery-and-why-it-changes-everythi.md]
* [2. What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build|310-2-what-cowork-provides-that-ingit-doesn-t-need-to-.md]
* [3. What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks|311-3-what-ingit-provides-that-cowork-lacks.md]
* [4. The Symbiotic Architecture|312-4-the-symbiotic-architecture.md]
* [5. Four Integration Paths in Order of Accessibility|313-5-four-integration-paths-in-order-of-accessibility.md]
* [6. Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind|314-6-refined-ingit-scope-with-cowork-in-mind.md]
* [7. Practical First Steps This Month|315-7-practical-first-steps-this-month.md]
* [Abstract|307-abstract.md]
* [Appendix A: Decision Tree for InGit Adopters|321-appendix-a-decision-tree-for-ingit-adopters.md]
* [Appendix B: Comparison Matrix|322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix.md]
* [Appendix B: Sub-Agent Registry Schema (Sketch)|270-appendix-b-sub-agent-registry-schema-sketch.md]
* [Appendix B: Summary of Contributions|149-appendix-b-summary-of-contributions.md]
* [Table of Contents|169-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|211-table-of-contents.md]
* [Table of Contents|253-table-of-contents.md]
* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|README.md]
* [Кластеры тематически близких файлов|../CLUSTERS.md]
* [Содержание|326-содержание.md]
* [Твой workflow|356-твой-workflow.md]
* [Что ты НЕ МОЖЕШЬ делать без Max approval|352-что-ты-не-можешь-делать-без-max-approval.md]
h2. Упоминается в

* [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам|../README.md]


h2. Связанные документы

* [6. Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind|314-6-refined-ingit-scope-with-cowork-in-mind.md] _42%_
* [1. The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything|309-1-the-cowork-discovery-and-why-it-changes-everythi.md] _37%_
* [2. What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build|310-2-what-cowork-provides-that-ingit-doesn-t-need-to-.md] _37%_
* [Appendix B: Comparison Matrix|322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix.md] _37%_
* [3. What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks|311-3-what-ingit-provides-that-cowork-lacks.md] _25%_
* [4. The Symbiotic Architecture|312-4-the-symbiotic-architecture.md] _25%_
* [Abstract|307-abstract.md] _21%_
* [Appendix B: Sub-Agent Registry Schema (Sketch)|270-appendix-b-sub-agent-registry-schema-sketch.md] _17%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [1. The Cowork Discovery and Why It Changes Everything|309-1-the-cowork-discovery-and-why-it-changes-everythi.md] _42%_
* [Содержание|326-содержание.md] _33%_
* [2. What Cowork Provides That InGit Doesn't Need to Build|310-2-what-cowork-provides-that-ingit-doesn-t-need-to-.md] _29%_
* [3. What InGit Provides That Cowork Lacks|311-3-what-ingit-provides-that-cowork-lacks.md] _29%_
* [6. Refined InGit Scope with Cowork in Mind|314-6-refined-ingit-scope-with-cowork-in-mind.md] _29%_
* [Appendix B: Comparison Matrix|322-appendix-b-comparison-matrix.md] _29%_
* [Кластеры тематически близких файлов|../CLUSTERS.md] _29%_
* [Table of Contents|137-table-of-contents.md] _25%_
